sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106073" key="tuflw/y" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυφλ-ώψ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῶπος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὤψ</etym>) <sense id="n106073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blind-eyed, blind,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τυφλίνης.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
